attacking_style: Solo opportunistic attacks in technical finales, exploiting adverse conditions and gaps in sprinter team control. Willing to commit fully despite limited team support.
team_tactics: Operates with minimal to no team support, relying on personal initiative rather than coordinated setups. Independent offensive rider.
terrain_preference: Wet, technical circuit finales where handling skills and positioning matter more than raw power. Thrives when sprinter teams face control challenges.
vulnerability: Lack of team support leaves attacks isolated. Final kilometer power appears insufficient to hold off organized chase groups.
key_patterns: Commits to solo attacks in challenging conditions when stronger teams struggle with race control.
Shows willingness to attack without team backup, relying on individual opportunism over coordination.
Strong in technical finales but lacks final kick to hold off chasers in last 700m.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows capability but insufficient data to assess trajectory
